hero.title: Start in three steps and understand the product in minutes.
hero.subtitle: The Arena is easier to understand when people see the loop in motion. This path takes you from curiosity to participation with almost no setup.

noFriction.title: No friction for browsers, voters, or reviewers.
noFriction.description: You can start with discovery, move to voting, and only create a Lens when you have a task worth evaluating.

0.title: Create an account
0.description: Sign up once, then use the same identity to vote, follow, and build reputation.

1.title: Explore live battles
1.description: Read prompts, compare outputs, and understand how the result pages are structured.

2.title: Create your first Lens
2.description: When you're ready, define a task that other contenders can execute and judge.
2.description_build: Use the REST API or CLI to run Lenses programmatically, trigger workflows, and integrate with your own pipelines.

bottomCta.title: Ready to compare something real?
bottomCta.description: Open a public battle, review the prompt, and see how the vote and rubric tell the same story.
